exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Kubernetes Orchestration
        K8s[Kubernetes] -->|Orchestration| AWS_S3
        K8s -->|Orchestration| Azure_Functions
        K8s -->|Orchestration| GCP_BigQuery
    end
    AWS_S3[Amazon S3] -->|Storage| Azure_Functions
    Azure_Functions[Azure Functions] -->|Compute| GCP_BigQuery
    GCP_BigQuery[Google BigQuery] -->|Analytics| K8s
    Azure_Functions -->|Serverless Compute| AWS_S3
    GCP_BigQuery -->|Data Warehouse| Azure_Functions
    K8s -->|Container Orchestration| GCP_BigQuery
    AWS_S3 -->|Object Storage| K8s
    Azure_Functions -->|Event-driven Compute| K8s
    GCP_BigQuery -->|Data Analytics| AWS_S3
